title: High Oil and Gas Prices Could Outlast Trump’s War With Iran
summary_full: While the president has promised rapid relief, Americans could feel the financial sting of the conflict for some time after it ends.
summary_public: While the president has promised rapid relief, Americans could feel the financial sting of the conflict for some time after it ends.
